name: knowledge
description: Knowledge vault — placeholder module. The data lives under bridge/core/paths.ts:knowledgeRoot (legacy bridge/knowledge/ or per-user bridge/users/<email>/knowledge/) and is read by the `knowledge-memory` MCP child (bridge/mcp/knowledge-server.js), which now imports the same paths getter so the data root is a single source of truth. There are no /v1/knowledge/* HTTP routes — the MCP server is the only consumer. The module exists to (a) reserve the slot in modules.json so a future Phase 2 cut can move both the data AND the MCP server here, and (b) prove the register-side structure works for behavior-less modules.
